cases.title: TS-07: Valid CSV roster import creates enrollments and returns summary counts
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is authenticated with roster:write permission
Reference data exists for class_code HESD-01 and subject_code SWE-101
CSV file contains required columns institutional_id, display_name, class_code, subject_code with three valid unique rows
steps: POST /roster/import as multipart/form-data with file field set to valid CSV
Assert HTTP status 202 and response includes batchId and status Processing
Poll GET /roster/imports/:batchId until status is Complete
Assert batch summary shows successRows=3 and errorRows=0
GET /enrollments?classId=<HESD-01-id>&subjectId=<SWE-101-id> with admin session
cases.expected: Three enrollment rows persisted and linked to student users; import batch reports accepted and rejected row counts per AC-03a; GET /enrollments returns all three students with totalCount=3

cases.title: RosterService.importCsv persists enrollments in Postgres transaction with row-level summary
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
roster-enrollment module RosterService is wired to EnrollmentRepository
Class HESD-01 and subject SWE-101 reference rows exist
CSV buffer contains two valid enrollment rows for distinct institutional IDs
steps: Invoke RosterService.importCsv with valid CSV buffer under admin context
Query enrollments table for class-subject pair within the same transaction scope
Verify RosterImportBatch row records successRows=2 and errorRows=0
Verify each enrollment links to an existing or newly provisioned student user row
cases.expected: Exactly two enrollment rows committed with correct classId, subjectId, and studentId foreign keys; ImportSummary reflects accepted count with no silent partial failure

cases.title: POST /roster/import returns 202 Accepted with batch envelope
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin session cookie is set
Valid CSV file with required columns is prepared
steps: Send POST /roster/import with Content-Type multipart/form-data and file field
Assert HTTP status 202 Accepted
Assert response body contains batchId (uuid), status Processing, and Vietnamese message
Assert response body does not contain row-level enrollment data
cases.expected: HTTP 202 Accepted with standard async-import envelope per API design §4.3; client must poll GET /roster/imports/:batchId for results

cases.title: TS-08: Duplicate enrollment row rejected while valid rows import successfully
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is authenticated
Class HESD-01 and subject SWE-101 exist in reference data
CSV contains two valid unique rows and one duplicate row (same institutional_id, class_code, subject_code as row 1)
steps: POST /roster/import with the mixed valid-and-duplicate CSV
Poll GET /roster/imports/:batchId until Complete
Assert successRows=2 and errorRows=1
Assert errorDetails contains row index and errorCode DuplicateEnrollment for the duplicate row
GET /enrollments for HESD-01 / SWE-101 and count results
cases.expected: Valid rows import; duplicate row rejected with row-level error per AC-03b; no silent partial failure; exactly two enrollments exist for the class-subject pair

cases.title: Duplicate enrollment within same class-subject rejected with DuplicateEnrollment row error
preconditions: Enrollment already exists for student SV2026001 in class HESD-01 subject SWE-101
RosterService.importCsv is invoked with admin context
steps: Import CSV row with institutional_id SV2026001, class_code HESD-01, subject_code SWE-101
Capture ImportSummary errorDetails for the rejected row
Query enrollments count for SV2026001 in HESD-01 / SWE-101
cases.expected: Row rejected with errorCode DuplicateEnrollment; enrollment count remains exactly one; no duplicate enrollment row created

cases.title: TS-09: Instructor assigned to HESD-01 denied roster for unassigned class
preconditions: Instructor is authenticated and has ClassAssignment only for class HESD-01
Class HESD-02 and subject SWE-101 exist with enrollments
Instructor lacks assignment to HESD-02
steps: GET /enrollments?classId=<HESD-02-id>&subjectId=<SWE-101-id> with Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403
Assert response errorCode Forbidden with localized permission-denied message
Verify response body contains no enrollment or student data
cases.expected: HTTP 403 Forbidden per AC-03c and BR-08; no roster data returned for out-of-scope class

cases.title: Instructor denied GET /enrollments for unassigned class-subject with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session with assignment scoped to HESD-01 only
Enrollments exist for HESD-02 / SWE-101
steps: GET /enrollments?classId=<HESD-02-id>&subjectId=<SWE-101-id> using Instructor session
Assert response status 403 and errorCode Forbidden
cases.expected: Access denied with Vietnamese permission error; zero enrollment records exposed

cases.title: Instructor and Student denied POST /roster/import with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Valid CSV file is prepared
Authenticated Instructor session and separate Student session are available
Neither role has roster:write permission
steps: POST /roster/import with valid CSV using Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP 403 Forbidden and no batchId created
POST /roster/import with valid CSV using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP 403 Forbidden and no RosterImportBatch row created
cases.expected: Both non-admin roles receive HTTP 403 with errorCode Forbidden; no import batch or enrollment rows created

cases.title: GET /roster/imports/:batchId returns successRows, errorRows, and errorDetails
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin completed POST /roster/import with a CSV containing one valid and one invalid row
batchId from 202 response is known
steps: GET /roster/imports/:batchId with admin session
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response body contains batchId, status Complete, successRows, errorRows, and errorDetails array
Assert each errorDetails entry includes rowNumber, errorCode, and message
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with RosterImportBatch DTO per API design §4.4; summary counts match actual import outcome

cases.title: GET /enrollments returns 200 with enrollment list for assigned class-subject
preconditions: Instructor is authenticated with ClassAssignment for HESD-01 / SWE-101
At least one enrollment exists for that class-subject pair
steps: GET /enrollments?classId=<HESD-01-id>&subjectId=<SWE-101-id> with Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response contains class, subject, enrollments array, and totalCount
Assert each enrollment entry has enrollmentId, student (id, institutionalId, displayName), and enrolledAt
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with scoped enrollment list per API design §4.2; instructor sees only assigned class-subject roster

cases.title: Flow A step 1: Admin seeds cohort roster via CSV import before session creation
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is authenticated
Empty class HESD-01 / SWE-101 reference data exists
CSV contains enrollments for all pilot cohort students (≥10 rows)
steps: POST /roster/import with cohort CSV file
Poll GET /roster/imports/:batchId until Complete with successRows matching CSV row count
GET /enrollments for HESD-01 / SWE-101 and verify totalCount matches imported count
Proceed to instructor session creation using the seeded class and subject (Flow A continuation)
cases.expected: Roster seeded successfully as Flow A prerequisite; all valid enrollments persisted and visible for downstream session open and check-in steps

cases.title: CSV missing required columns rejects all rows in batch summary
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is authenticated
CSV file omits subject_code column but includes other fields
steps: POST /roster/import with malformed-column CSV
Poll GET /roster/imports/:batchId until Complete
Assert errorRows equals total data row count and successRows=0
Verify no new enrollment rows were created
cases.expected: All rows rejected with column validation errors per validation rules §3.3; no enrollments persisted; summary surfaces rejected count without silent failure

cases.title: POST /roster/import without file field returns 422 InvalidFile
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is authenticated
steps: POST /roster/import as multipart/form-data with no file field
Assert HTTP status 422
Assert response errorCode InvalidFile with Vietnamese message File CSV không hợp lệ hoặc quá lớn
cases.expected: HTTP 422 InvalidFile per error handling catalog; no import batch created

cases.title: Unknown class_code row rejected with UnknownClassCode error
preconditions: RosterService.importCsv invoked under admin context
CSV row references class_code NONEXIST-99 with otherwise valid fields
steps: Import CSV with one row containing unknown class_code NONEXIST-99
Capture ImportSummary errorDetails
Query enrollments table for any row referencing NONEXIST-99
cases.expected: Row rejected with errorCode UnknownClassCode; zero enrollment rows created for unknown class

cases.title: dryRun=true validates CSV and returns summary without persisting enrollments
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Valid CSV with three rows is prepared
No prior enrollments exist for the CSV students in target class-subject
steps: Invoke RosterService.importCsv with dryRun=true flag
Assert ImportSummary reports successRows=3
Query enrollments table for the target class-subject pair
Re-run import with dryRun=false and verify enrollments are now persisted
cases.expected: dryRun pass returns validation summary only with no DB writes; subsequent non-dry-run import commits the three enrollment rows

cases.title: Admin uploads CSV via RosterImportForm and sees import summary counts
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is logged in to admin SPA
Admin navigates to roster import page
Valid CSV file with required columns is available for upload
steps: Open RosterImportPanel and select valid CSV file via file input
Click confirm import action
Wait for import processing to complete
Verify summary screen displays accepted and rejected row counts per AC-03a (e.g. Đã nhập {n} dòng; {m} dòng lỗi)
cases.expected: Import completes with visible summary counts matching API batch result; success state shown when all rows accepted

cases.title: Partial import failure shows expandable per-row error list
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is logged in to admin SPA
CSV file contains mix of valid rows and duplicate enrollment rows
steps: Upload the mixed CSV via RosterImportForm and submit
Wait for import summary screen
Verify summary shows both accepted and rejected counts
Expand the error list section and verify each rejected row displays row number and error reason
cases.expected: Partial failure UI per AC-03b shows expandable error list with row-level DuplicateEnrollment details; valid rows reflected in accepted count

cases.title: Instructor views enrolled students table for assigned class only
preconditions: Instructor is logged in with assignment to HESD-01 / SWE-101
Enrollments exist for assigned class-subject
Instructor navigates to roster view for HESD-01
steps: Select class HESD-01 and subject SWE-101 in roster filter controls
Verify roster table renders student ID, display name, and enrollment columns
Attempt to navigate or filter to unassigned class HESD-02
Observe permission-denied state or empty/disabled class option
cases.expected: Assigned class roster displays enrolled students in table; unassigned class access blocked in UI consistent with AC-03c
